description: Benchmark tests for aria-report skill - structured Issue reporting with environment collection, privacy review, and multi-route submission

evals.name: bug-report-with-error-output
evals.prompt: aria 的 state-scanner 在我项目上跑到一半报错了：'Cannot read property phases of undefined'，然后直接退出。我的 .aria/config.json 配置文件是有的，macOS 系统。帮我把这个 bug 报给 Aria 维护团队。

assertions.name: classifies_as_bug
assertions.description: Should correctly classify this as a Bug Report, not a feature request or question
assertions.check: output.includes('Bug') || output.includes('bug') || output.includes('缺陷') || output.includes('报告')

assertions.name: collects_environment_info
assertions.description: Should attempt to collect environment information (plugin version, OS, config status) before composing the issue
assertions.check: output.includes('版本') || output.includes('version') || output.includes('Plugin') || output.includes('环境')

assertions.name: uses_structured_template
assertions.description: Should use a structured Bug Report template with sections (description, reproduction steps, expected/actual behavior)
assertions.check: output.includes('复现') || output.includes('步骤') || output.includes('预期') || output.includes('实际') || output.includes('reproduction') || output.includes('expected')

assertions.name: includes_privacy_review
assertions.description: Should show the full issue content to user for confirmation before attempting submission
assertions.check: output.includes('确认') || output.includes('confirm') || output.includes('审查') || output.includes('review') || output.includes('提交前')

assertions.name: targets_correct_repo
assertions.description: Should mention the target repository (10CG/Aria or 10CG/aria-plugin) for issue submission

evals.name: feature-request-english
evals.prompt: I think Aria should support YAML config files in addition to JSON. The .aria/config.json works but YAML would be more readable for complex configurations with inline comments. Please submit this as a feature request to the Aria maintainers.

assertions.name: classifies_as_feature
assertions.description: Should correctly classify this as a Feature Request, not a bug report
assertions.check: output.includes('Feature') || output.includes('feature') || output.includes('enhancement') || output.includes('功能建议')

assertions.name: captures_use_case
assertions.description: Should include the user's use case (YAML readability, comment support) in the issue body

assertions.name: structured_feature_template
assertions.description: Should use a structured template with use case and proposed solution sections
assertions.check: output.includes('使用场景') || output.includes('Use Case') || output.includes('use case') || output.includes('建议方案') || output.includes('Proposed') || output.includes('Solution')

assertions.name: includes_privacy_review
assertions.description: Should present the composed issue content to user for review before submission

evals.name: question-with-prior-research
evals.prompt: tdd-enforcer 的三个 strictness 级别（advisory/strict/superpowers）我看了文档还是搞不太清楚区别在哪。能帮我提个 question 给 Aria 团队问问吗？

assertions.name: classifies_as_question
assertions.description: Should correctly classify this as a Question, not a bug or feature
assertions.check: output.includes('Question') || output.includes('question') || output.includes('提问') || output.includes('问题')

assertions.name: preserves_user_context
assertions.description: Should mention in the issue that the user already tried reading the docs
assertions.check: output.includes('文档') || output.includes('doc') || output.includes('看了') || output.includes('read') || output.includes('tried')

assertions.name: includes_specific_subject
assertions.description: Should reference the specific topic (tdd-enforcer strictness levels) in the issue title or body

evals.name: routing-logic-no-token
evals.prompt: 我发现 workflow-runner 在 auto-proceed 模式下跳过了 Gate 1 的审批步骤，这应该是个 bug。帮我提交 issue。我没有配置 GITHUB_TOKEN。

assertions.name: detects_no_token_fallback
assertions.description: Should detect the absence of tokens and fall back to GitHub Pre-filled URL method
assertions.check: output.includes('URL') || output.includes('url') || output.includes('浏览器') || output.includes('browser') || output.includes('链接') || output.includes('link')

assertions.name: provides_github_url
assertions.description: Should provide a GitHub issues URL for manual submission

assertions.name: suggests_token_setup
assertions.description: Should suggest configuring GITHUB_TOKEN for future direct submissions
